name: MoneyGram
description_short: Sacramento's MoneyGram location at 8391 Folsom Blvd offers check cashing and money transfers to CA residents during extended weekday hours.
description_long:
MoneyGram's Sacramento location at 8391 Folsom Blvd b is a standalone check-cashing facility in central Sacramento, CA. The store is open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, and Saturday 9AM to 6PM, giving Sacramento residents convenient access to cash services during extended business hours. Whether you need to cash a check or send money quickly, this Sacramento address is positioned for easy drop-in visits.

At the 8391 Folsom Blvd location in Sacramento, you can access check cashing, money transfers, and payment services. The friendly team can be reached at +1 916-388-0673 to discuss your specific needs or to confirm service availability. Call ahead if you need expedited assistance at this Sacramento branch.

For Sacramento residents who need fast cash or reliable money transfer services, this MoneyGram location is a practical choice. Bring a valid government-issued ID and the check or payment details you need to process. MoneyGram serves communities across the country, and this Sacramento-area store is designed for quick, straightforward transactions without appointments.
pros: Extensive network of 28 locations in Sacramento across multiple partner retailers including Walmart, Save Mart, and Ace Cash Express
Flexible service options with both online and in-person transaction capabilities
Extended hours at many locations, with some partners open until 11:59 PM
Partnership model provides access through trusted, familiar retail environments
Multiple service types available at single locations (transfers, bill pay, check cashing)
Convenient geographic distribution across different neighborhoods in Sacramento
cons: Transaction fees apply to money transfers, reducing the amount received by recipients
International transfers subject to currency conversion rates and additional markups
Service dependent on partner location availability and hours rather than dedicated MoneyGram branches
No indication of competitive pricing compared to other money transfer services
Limited financial products beyond basic money transfer and bill payment services
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing occasional domestic money transfers
Immigrants sending money to family members internationally
Individuals seeking bill payment services outside traditional banking hours
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers needing convenient, accessible money transfer and bill payment services without a traditional bank account. The primary caveat is that all services carry transaction fees that reduce the net amount transferred, and customers should compare rates across providers before using the service.
meta_description: Sacramento MoneyGram at 8391 Folsom Blvd, CA. Check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services with extended hours.
